name: Nyamuragira
location: East Africa, Democratic Republic of Congo
eruptionHistory: Africa's most active volcano. Has erupted more than 30 times since 1882. Produced a lava lake in its summit crater in 2012.
description: Nyamuragira is the most active volcano in Africa, erupting roughly every 2-4 years. Its lava flows have repeatedly threatened Virunga National Park and mountain gorilla habitat.
